description: Public gift assignment tables – deterministic, code-agnostic, safe for commercial implementation under the personal-use license.

FractalCarapace.effect: Physical damage resistance scales with fractal depth

SymmetryBloom.effect: Perfect mirror clones on critical hits (1–3 clones)

RecursiveFocus.effect: Abilities may be nested/repeated up to recursion depth

ThoughtWeave.effect: Read and implant thoughts in nearby minds

FateThread.effect: Once per cycle, rewind personal timeline 10 seconds

CelestialResonance.effect: Glow with coherent light; allies gain +20% coherence

ShadowCloak.effect: Become invisible while standing in repressed emotion fields

VoidWhisper.effect: Speak a word that erases one non-essential memory from target

OrderAnchor.effect: Nearby allies cannot be calmed/stunned enemies

ResonanceShield.effect: Reflect spells that match creature’s current plane

FractalSpike.effect: Grow lethal fractal blades from body

SingularityPulse.effect: Once-only black-hole implosion that rewrites local rules

EclipseShift.effect: Swap current plane with its opposite for 60 s
